message:
test(wa-core): add trace stability and boundedness tests

Add trace_invariants.rs test module validating MatchTrace guarantees:

Golden stability tests:
- TraceOptions defaults are sensible and bounded
- Trace structure is deterministic for same inputs

Boundedness tests:
- TraceBounds enforces configured limits
- Truncation is explicit in output

Redaction tests:
- Redactor removes secrets from trace evidence
- No sensitive data leaks into TraceSpan

Related beads: wa-upg.14.5, wa-upg.14.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
